title: Kali Karate: The 2nd Beginning
overview: A mockumentary following the comeback of washed up prize fighter and action star, Sensai Houston. After blackmailing a B-list Hollywood producer, he gets his Martial Arts talk show fully financed, in hopes of getting his ex wife back.
